recommendations.title: Dial M for Murder
recommendations.overview: When her American lover visits London, a wealthy woman’s jealous husband hatches a plan to murder her and inherit her fortune.

recommendations.title: Vertigo
recommendations.overview: A retired San Francisco detective suffering from acrophobia investigates the strange activities of an old friend's wife, all the while becoming dangerously obsessed with her.

recommendations.title: Rear Window
recommendations.overview: A wheelchair-bound photographer spies on his neighbors from his apartment window and becomes convinced one of them has committed murder.

recommendations.title: Psycho
recommendations.overview: When larcenous real estate clerk Marion Crane goes on the lam with a wad of cash and hopes of starting a new life, she ends up at the notorious Bates Motel, where manager Norman Bates cares for his housebound mother.

recommendations.title: North by Northwest
recommendations.overview: Advertising man Roger Thornhill is mistaken for a spy, triggering a deadly cross-country chase.

recommendations.title: The Birds
recommendations.overview: Thousands of birds flock into a seaside town and terrorize the residents in a series of deadly attacks.

recommendations.title: Rope
recommendations.overview: Two young men attempt to prove they committed the perfect murder by hosting a dinner party for the family of a classmate they just strangled to death.

recommendations.title: Lifeboat
recommendations.overview: During World War II, a small group of survivors is stranded in a lifeboat together after the ship they were traveling on is destroyed by a German U-boat.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much
recommendations.overview: An American doctor and his wife, a former singing star, witness a murder while vacationing in Morocco, and are drawn into a twisting plot of international intrigue when their young son is kidnapped.

recommendations.title: Number Seventeen
recommendations.overview: A gang of jewel thieves hides out in an abandoned London house after a robbery, unaware that a detective is among them in disguise.
